nasb.text: moreover, that every man who eats and drinks sees good in all his labor—it is the gift of God.

esv.text: also that everyone should eat and drink and take pleasure in all his toil—this is God’s gift to man.

cnv.text: 人人有吃有喝，在自己的一切勞碌中自得其樂；這就是　神的恩賜。

ccb.text: 人人都该吃喝、享受自己劳苦的成果，这是上帝的恩赐。

csbs.text: 并且，人人吃喝，在一切的劳苦中享受好处——这也是神的恩赐。
